2026-04-23T08:02:09.4022550Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4023112Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4023543Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4023912Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4024224Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4024458Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4024617Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4024797Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4024966Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4025201Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4025405Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4025696Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:02:09.4025964Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

Supports reply_to_id for discussion threading.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"The comment text in Markdown format. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"reply_to_id":{"description":"Node ID of the discussion comment to reply to, enabling threaded discussion comments.
